login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Enter your registered email or username and we'll send you a one-time code to sign you in.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a one-time code to verify it.

profile.title: Tell us about you
profile.subtitle: Finish setting up your account. You can change these later in settings.

legal.bySigningIn: By signing in, you agree to our

errors.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 1 character
errors.usernameMaxLength: Username must be at most 50 characters
errors.firstNameRequired: First name must be at least 2 characters
errors.lastNameRequired: Last name must be at least 2 characters
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions
errors.validationError: Invalid request. Please check your information.
errors.userExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your information.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.otpCooldown: Please wait 30 seconds before requesting a new code.
errors.otpInvalid: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
errors.otpExpired: Verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.unknownError: An error occurred. Please try again.
